title: Day 26 -  Kanji Practice
html:
Day 26 - Kanji Practice

Please download today's kanji practice here: Kanji Practice Day 26.pdf

Practising writing kanji every day is a very important exercise to help you learn quickly. If you have any questions you can always ask other students and teachers in the community here.

Refer back to the Week 6 - Kanji lesson to watch how to do the correct stroke order for 会, 社, 員.
